use_cases: Display patient vital statistics with trend visualization in healthcare dashboards
Show fitness metrics and progress tracking with animated bar graphs in wellness apps
Present health-related KPI summaries with interactive tooltips in admin panels
Render analytics cards with statistical breakdowns in SaaS dashboards
Display product or system health metrics with legend-based data breakdown
ai_summary: A composite data-display card component designed for presenting health statistics and metrics with optional animated bar graphs. Features a structured layout with header, stat grid, visualization area, and tooltip-enabled legend. Built with Framer Motion for entrance animations and integrates with shadcn/ui tooltip system for enhanced data exploration.
